titleStmt.title: 土门掌山神庙:民国三十五年(1946)《重修庙宇一间暨创建卷棚两间记》
土門掌山神殿:民國三十五年(1946)《重修廟宇一間暨創建捲棚兩間記》
Tu men zhang shan shen miao ming guo san shi wu nian (1986) "Chong xiu miao yu yi jian ji chuang jian juan peng liang jian ji"
Tu men zhang shan shen miao mingguo sanshiwu nian (1986) "Chongxiu miaoyu yi jian ji chuangjian juan peng liang jian ji"
焦作师范高等专科学校学报
焦作師範高等專科學校學報

revisionDesc.change: CREATED: This bibl record was autogenerated from a Zotero record.

analytic.title: 土门掌山神庙:民国三十五年(1946)《重修庙宇一间暨创建卷棚两间记》
土門掌山神殿:民國三十五年(1946)《重修廟宇一間暨創建捲棚兩間記》
Tu men zhang shan shen miao ming guo san shi wu nian (1986) "Chong xiu miao yu yi jian ji chuang jian juan peng liang jian ji"
Tu men zhang shan shen miao mingguo sanshiwu nian (1986) "Chongxiu miaoyu yi jian ji chuangjian juan peng liang jian ji"

monogr.title: 焦作师范高等专科学校学报
焦作師範高等專科學校學報
Jiao zuo shi fan gao deng zhuan ke xue xiao xue bao
Jiaozuo shifan gaodeng zhuanke xuexiao xuebao

biblStruct.note: <正>[碑文]重修庙宇一間暨創建捲棚兩間記/此地舊有五道、山神、土地庙一間,無木碍券,前人創造,本意誠欲萬載無損,不意歴/年久遠,漸漸損坏,巖牆崩券,延至民國二十五年夏五月間倏然倒塌,神像石乍毀,村/人覩此莫不驚心,迄二十六年春合

body.bibl: 程谦. “土门掌山神庙:民国三十五年(1946)《重修庙宇一间暨创建卷棚两间记》.” 焦作师范高等专科学校学报 35, no. 4 (2019): 85. https://kns.cnki.net/kcms2/article/abstract?v=S5uBaE2M3OcKzhzYu0mdGJz3NLdGhaF_vxQaBXb-Ys1ZkUl6u_Xyl1CtmpkhJETXuHdveT_9_VZ7xHh6Ivy__azal2xpoCK5fZtcb3F28ykciGnHfTLI9YDfMEcq4pts&uniplatform=NZKPT&language=gb.
